description_long: This is a single slice of layered cake featuring alternating layers of dark chocolate sponge and light cream filling. The exterior is coated with a smooth, pale cream frosting, and the top is decorated with three round dollops of cream and a small rectangular white chocolate piece. The sides reveal the distinct, even layers of chocolate and cream, with the top edge finished in a dark chocolate ganache. The cake appears moist and soft, with a slightly glossy finish on the chocolate portions and a matte, airy texture on the cream. The slice is not presented on any visible plate or tray, and no candles or elaborate decorations are present.
description: A slice of layered chocolate and cream cake with cream dollops and a white chocolate piece on top, finished with a dark chocolate edge.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing three cream dollops and a white chocolate piece on a smooth cream surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered structure of chocolate sponge and cream, with decorations visible on top.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the dark chocolate ganache edge and the vertical layering of the cake.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the cake slice, with visible cream and chocolate layers and minimal decoration.
